Floop Feedback Tools

A collection of lightweight, experimental tools designed to help young people and adults share their thoughts in creative, low-pressure ways.

Feedback Tools

🖼️

Projector

Turn your idea into an easy-to-understand project to share with classmates, colleagues, friends, or family.

Open Tool →
🗂️

Saved Projects

View all the projects saved with Projector — browse entries and re-download any report as an RTF file.

View Saved Projects →
🎨

Drawback

A minimalist drawing tool with a limited palette, perfect for visual storytelling and abstract feedback.

Open Tool →
🖼️

Gallery

View all the drawings submitted by Drawback users.

Open Tool →
😊

Totes Emote

Pick an emoji to show how you're feeling, then sketch your thoughts on a mini drawing canvas.

Open Tool →

Context & Background

🧰

KwaCart

A Django-based facilitation platform built around Liberating Structures — 23 participatory methods that help groups do their best thinking together.

Read More →
🗣️

About AAC

Learn about Augmentative & Alternative Communication — what it is, who uses it, and where to find trusted resources.

Read More →

💡

Suggest a Tool

Have an idea for a new Floop tool? Tell us what it would do, how it could be built, and who it would help.

Share Your Idea →

ℹ️

About

About this project and its creator.

Read More →

About the Project

The Mission

Traditional feedback forms can be intimidating. This sandbox explores modular "micro-interactions" that make giving feedback feel like a natural part of a conversation.

Design Principles

  • Low cognitive load
  • Mobile-first interaction
  • Accessible and inclusive design
© 2026 Feedback Sandbox Project
